text.text: Ketrik turns your data and workflows into an AI-powered command center — allowing you to see, react, and execute the moment decisions are made, without months of custom platform engineering.

ds.title: Operators & Founders
ds.description: Run your business from one live screen. Get instant visibility into live metrics, risk warnings, and operational workflows — giving you full control from MVP to scale.

ds.title: Consultants & Analysts
ds.description: Turn your data models into client-ready tools. Plug in your custom metrics and algorithms, and let Ketrik handle the dashboards, alerts, and workflows they need.

text.text: In computing, a shell is just the interface people use to control a system — the outer layer that shows what's going on and lets you act. Ketrik is that shell for your business: the live control panel sitting on top of your data and workflows.

shellfaq.question: Is Ketrik a dashboard tool, a workflow tool, or an AI tool?
shellfaq.answer: It's the shell — the live interface that sits on top of all three. You or your data experts define how data and workflows work; Ketrik turns that into dashboards, alerts, and a command center you can actually use every day.

shellfaq.question: Do I need to be technical to use it?
shellfaq.answer: No. You see clear numbers, alerts, and actions. The technical work—models, pipelines, custom metrics — can be done by us, your consultant, or your data scientist and then plugged into Ketrik.

ds.title: One control surface, not ten tools
ds.description: Consolidate scattered views and portals into a single, unified interface.

ds.title: Feeds on what you already have
ds.description: Sits cleanly on top of your existing data, models, and workflows without requiring a rebuild.

ds.title: Reactive by design, AI under the hood
ds.description: Surfaces immediate alerts and guided actions the moment operational thresholds shift.

text.text: The software you built two years ago can't keep up with the business you run today

ds.title: Workflows
ds.description: Workflows aren't a one-time build — they need to keep changing as your business changes. Keeping them current is what keeps the business running smoothly.

ds.title: Dashboards
ds.description: The questions your business needs answered change all the time. A dashboard only has value if it can keep up and show you what matters right now.

ds.title: Command
ds.description: As you grow into new markets and take on new clients, your command center has to grow with you. It only works if it's built to keep pace.

ds.title: Operations
ds.description: Operations run on being able to respond in the moment. That only happens when the system is always current, not playing catch-up.

text.text: The table breaks down how the Managed Modular Approach solves the fragility of AI-only "Vibe Coding" while avoiding the slow, high-cost hurdles of a Traditional Agency.

style.backgroundImage: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 20px, transparent 20px, transparent 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 40px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 20px, transparent 20px, transparent 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 40px), radial-gradient(circle at 20px 20px, rgba(55, 65, 81, 0.12) 2px, transparent 2px), radial-gradient(circle at 40px 40px, rgba(55, 65, 81, 0.12) 2px, transparent 2px)

text.text: Think of it like a high-stakes expedition. 'Vibe coding' is a great way to start moving, but without professional-grade equipment, you'll stall as soon as the terrain gets tough. We provide the technical durability that allows you to pivot and scale as the market changes. By reinforcing your vision with resilient architecture, we ensure your platform stays fast and stable—whether you're serving ten users or ten thousand.
text.text2: Think of it like an expedition. 'Vibe coding' is a fast start, but if you don't have the right equipment, you'll stall as soon as the terrain gets tough. We provide the technical durability that allows you to pivot and scale as the market changes. We ensure your foundation is resilient, so whether you're serving ten users or ten thousand, your platform remains fast, stable, and ready for the road ahead.

ds.description: We bypass the "grunt work" using our MUI library to launch your custom platform faster.
ds.title: 1. Accelerated MVP Assembly

ds.description: We design a "bulletproof" brain, mapping data and APIs for maximum logic and speed.
ds.title: 2. High-Performance Architecture

ds.description: We handle AWS/Firebase, security, and 24/7 monitoring so you can scale without the stress.
ds.title: 3. Zero-Ops Managed Hosting

ds.description: We provide the ongoing roadmap and iterations to ensure your product grows as fast as your vision.
ds.title: 4. Strategic Product Evolution

ds1.description: We conduct an intensive deep-dive into your business goals, current tech stack, and future scaling requirements.
ds1.title: 1. Define & Design

ds1.description: We build the platform using cloud solutions, focusing on security, stability, and reproducibility.
ds1.title: 2. Implement & Automate

ds1.description: We conduct rigorous testing, performance tuning, and operational stabilization.
ds1.title: 3. Stabilize & Transfer

ds1.description: Architectures built with high availability, redundancy, and automated failover baked in, leveraging best practices.
ds1.title: 4. Designed for Uptime

text.text: We build the operational backbone your platform needs to scale, clearing the path for your team to focus entirely on innovation.

style.backgroundImage: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 20px, transparent 20px, transparent 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 40px),repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 19px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 20px, transparent 20px, transparent 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 39px, rgba(75, 85, 99, 0.08) 40px), radial-gradient(circle at 20px 20px, rgba(55, 65, 81, 0.12) 2px, transparent 2px), radial-gradient(circle at 40px 40px, rgba(55, 65, 81, 0.12) 2px, transparent 2px)

ds.description: It starts with a project submission. We review your vision, technical requirements, and market goals to ensure they align with our Lab’s expertise and current capacity.
ds.title: 1. Venture Intake

ds.description: We map out your 'Vibe-to-Architecture' path. For startups, we focus on market entry; for Enterprise partners, we focus on cloud modernization, security compliance, and seamless integration with existing AWS or Google Cloud ecosystems.
ds.title: 2. The Deep-Dive Session

ds.description: No two ventures are the same. We define a custom engagement model—ranging from rapid-prototype MVP builds to Enterprise-level SOWs (Statements of Work)—tailored to your internal procurement and roadmap requirements.
ds.title: 3. Bespoke Structuring

ds.description: We move into high-velocity development. Using our validated component library, we transform your concept into a secure, launch-ready environment that meets enterprise-grade standards for audit and scale.
ds.title: 4. Lab Execution

text.text: Why we built a Lab, not an Agency? We believe the best products are born from the intersection of creative intuition and rigorous engineering. In the Lab, we don't just solve tickets; we solve for the venture’s future.
text.text1: Beyond code, we invest our conviction. We are a boutique studio that prioritizes deep technical involvement in projects that challenge the status quo.

text.text: We are a boutique venture lab
text.text1: We prioritize deep partnerships over high-volume projects

text.text: The difference between a successful market launch and a stalled project is speed, expertise, and predictability. Outsource the build, mitigate the risk, and achieve revenue goals months ahead of your competition.

defaults.title: Basic
defaults.subheader: Bar charts help visualize data comparisons across categories. They are effective for highlighting differences and trends using vertical or horizontal bars.

defaults.title: Basic
defaults.subheader: Bar charts help visualize data comparisons across categories. They are effective for highlighting differences and trends using vertical or horizontal bars.

defaults.title: Basic
defaults.subheader: Bar charts help visualize data comparisons across categories. They are effective for highlighting differences and trends using vertical or horizontal bars.

defaults.title: Stacked
defaults.subheader: Stacked bar charts let you compare parts of a whole across categories. Each bar stacks its values to show how they build up.

Allows you to create multiple panes in a single chart. Useful for a variety of analytical and visualization scenarios, especially when dealing with complex datasets or requiring detailed comparative analysis across different data dimensions

defaults.title: Forex Cross Rates
defaults.subheader: Display real-time quotes of selected currencies in comparison to other major currencies.

defaults.title: Forex Heatmap
defaults.subheader: Show off a snapshot of currency market action. This widget lets you spot strong and weak currencies and see how they compare to each other, all in real-time.

defaults.title: Market Data
defaults.subheader: Grab an overview of global markets performance, including change values, Open, High, Low, and Close values for selected financial instruments.
This series is represented with a colored area between the time scale and line connecting all data points

This series illustrates price movements with vertical bars. The length of each bar corresponds to the range between the highest and lowest price values. Open and close values are represented with the tick marks on the left and right side of the bar, respectively
This series is represented with two colored areas between the the base value line and line connecting all data points

This series illustrates price movements with candlesticks. The solid body of each candlestick represents the open and close values for the time period. Vertical lines, known as wicks, above and below the candle body represent the high and low values, respectively
This series illustrates the distribution of values with columns
This series is represented with a set of data points connected by straight line segments
The yield curve chart is specifically designed for displaying yield curves, common in financial analysis.
The options chart is a specialized type that uses price values on the horizontal scale instead of time.
